headline: Dover Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 (fifty-two cents) per share, payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 29, 2026.

headline: Dover: Despite Strong Growth, Investors Should Tread Cautiously
summary: Dover Corp. remains a high-quality, diversified industrial with solid revenue and profit growth, but its current valuation is lofty. Read this DOV stock update.
